search_query: do rappers write lyrics to beats
combined_text: Are rap lyrics made around a beat or is the beat made around the rap lyrics? "Jen-Yu Fu, rap genius nerd, procrastinates by listening to rap Answered Apr 14, 2015Both, sometimes a rapper finds a really good beat and they'll write over it. Other times they will just be nodding to themselves and a beat will form in their head as they write and they add on the instrumental late
